message:
fix: add aria-label to icon-only buttons on 3 cards (#8903)

Addresses #8884 — partial progress on Auto-QA ARIA label gaps.

Adds aria-label (and where applicable aria-expanded / aria-pressed /
aria-haspopup) to icon-only buttons that previously relied on title
only or had no accessible name at all:

- IframeEmbed: close-settings X, open-in-new-tab, settings toggle
- ClusterGroups: edit and delete group icon buttons
- HardwareHealthCard: snooze-toggle and snooze-all menu trigger
  (also replaces hardcoded English snooze title strings with i18n keys)

Adds matching keys to web/src/locales/en/cards.json.

Remaining cards from the Auto-QA finding either already have
aria-label (the scanner regex produced false positives — most flagged
role="button" elements already carry aria-label on the next 1-2
lines) or are out of scope for this partial PR.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
